tools.name: amazon__package_track
tools.description: [amazon · risk:low] Look up the delivery status of an Amazon order (read-only)

tools.description: [applehealth · risk:medium] Read heart-rate data from Apple Health

tools.description: [applehealth · risk:medium] Read sleep-analysis data from Apple Health

tools.name: applehealth__steps_read
tools.description: [applehealth · risk:medium] Read step-count data from Apple Health

tools.name: bluesky__trending_get
tools.description: [bluesky · risk:low] Fetch the current trending topics on Bluesky. Returns topic names, display labels, and links to the topic feed. No account or API key required.

tools.name: chase__balance_check
tools.description: [chase · risk:low] Read the current balance of a Chase account (read-only)

tools.name: datadog__logs_view
tools.description: [datadog · risk:low] Search and read logs from Datadog over a time range

tools.name: delta__boardingpass_show
tools.description: [delta · risk:low] Pull up the boarding pass for a Delta flight

tools.name: duvera__dev_npm_package
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Look up the latest version, description, license, and dependencies of an npm package. Works for scoped packages too (e.g. "@types/node"). No account required.

tools.name: duvera__dev_pypi_package
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Look up the current version, summary, license, and homepage of a Python package on PyPI. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__dev_stackoverflow_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search Stack Overflow questions by keyword. Returns top 5 by relevance with title, link, score, and answer status. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__finance_crypto_price
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Current spot price for one or more cryptocurrencies (CoinGecko ids like "bitcoin,ethereum,solana") in a fiat currency (default USD). Read-only market data. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__finance_exchange_rates
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Live USD exchange rates against major currencies. Read-only, no account required.

tools.name: duvera__food_recipe_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search recipes by dish name (e.g. "arrabiata", "pad thai"). Returns ingredients, instructions, category, and cuisine. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__food_restaurant_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search for restaurants and food places by name or location using OpenStreetMap. Read-only, no account required.

tools.name: duvera__geo_geocode
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Convert a city or place name (e.g. "Berlin", "San Francisco") to latitude/longitude, country, timezone, and population. Use this before weather.current or weather.air-quality when you only have a place name. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__github_latest_release
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Get the latest published release (tag, name, notes, date) of a public GitHub repository. Returns 404 for repos that publish no releases. No auth required.

tools.name: duvera__github_read_file
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Read a file from a public GitHub repository. Read-only.

tools.name: duvera__github_search_repos
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search public GitHub repositories by keyword. Returns top 5 results by stars. No auth required.

tools.name: duvera__news_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search Hacker News stories by keyword, ranked by relevance. Returns title, URL, points, author, and comment count. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__news_top_stories
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Top stories from Hacker News. Read-only, no account required.

tools.name: duvera__reference_dictionary
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Definitions, phonetics, part of speech, and examples for an English word. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__reference_public_holidays
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Public holidays for a given year and ISO country code (e.g. 2026 + "US"). Includes national and regional holidays with dates and names. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__time_now
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Current date and time in an IANA timezone (e.g. "America/New_York", "Asia/Tokyo"). Includes day of week and DST status. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__travel_flight_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] List aircraft currently airborne within a radius of a point (adsb.lol ADS-B data). Use geo.geocode to get a city's coordinates first. Returns callsign, altitude, speed, and position. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__weather_air_quality
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Current air quality (US AQI, PM2.5, PM10, ozone) for a latitude/longitude. Use geo.geocode first if you only have a place name. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__weather_current
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Current temperature, conditions, wind, and humidity for a latitude/longitude (Open-Meteo). Use geo.geocode first if you only have a city or place name. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__wiki_search
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Search Wikipedia articles by keyword. Returns matching page titles, keys, and excerpts. Pass a result's key to wiki.summary for the article summary. No account required.

tools.name: duvera__wiki_summary
tools.description: [duvera · risk:low] Get the lead summary of a Wikipedia article by title (e.g. "Zero_trust_architecture"). Use wiki.search first to find the exact page key. No account required.

tools.name: gmail__mail_read
tools.description: [gmail · risk:low] Read recent emails from the Gmail inbox

tools.name: google_workspace__mail_search
tools.description: [google-workspace · risk:low] Search Mail via Gmail, governed by Duvera.

tools.name: googlecalendar__availability_find
tools.description: [googlecalendar · risk:low] Find open time slots within a date range in Google Calendar

tools.name: grubhub__order_track
tools.description: [grubhub · risk:low] Check the live status and ETA of a Grubhub order

tools.name: hackernews__stories_top
tools.description: [hackernews · risk:low] Fetch the current list of top-story ids on Hacker News. Returns an array of item ids (resolve details via the item endpoint). No account or API key required; the hacker-news.firebaseio.com endpoint is open and unmetered.

tools.name: instacart__menu_search
tools.description: [instacart · risk:low] Search for grocery items and stores in the Instacart app

tools.name: maps__eta_share
tools.description: [maps · risk:low] Share your estimated time of arrival with a contact from Apple Maps

tools.name: microsoft365__calendar_list
tools.description: [microsoft365 · risk:low] List Calendar via Outlook Calendar, governed by Duvera.

tools.name: microsoft365__mail_search
tools.description: [microsoft365 · risk:low] Search Mail via Outlook / Exchange, governed by Duvera.

tools.name: notion__notes_search
tools.description: [notion · risk:low] Search pages and notes in Notion by query

tools.name: obsidian__notes_search
tools.description: [obsidian · risk:low] Search notes in an Obsidian vault by query

tools.name: open_meteo__weather_forecast
tools.description: [open-meteo · risk:low] Current temperature, conditions, humidity, and wind for a latitude/longitude, from Open-Meteo.

tools.name: opensky__flights_live
tools.description: [opensky · risk:low] List aircraft currently airborne within a latitude/longitude box, from OpenSky's live ADS-B feed.

tools.name: postgres__sql_read
tools.description: [postgres · risk:low] Execute a read-only SQL query against a Postgres database

tools.name: shazam__audio_identify
tools.description: [shazam · risk:low] Identify the song currently playing using Shazam

tools.name: slack__message_search
tools.description: [slack · risk:low] Search recent messages across Slack channels

tools.name: southwest__flight_status
tools.description: [southwest · risk:low] Check the status of a Southwest flight

tools.name: telegram__message_read
tools.description: [telegram · risk:low] Read recent messages from a Telegram chat

tools.name: twitter__tweets_search
tools.description: [twitter · risk:low] Search for recent tweets matching a keyword, hashtag, or phrase using the Twitter v2 API. Pass your Twitter Bearer Token via X-Duvera-Service-Token header — Duvera never stores it. Get a free Bearer Token at developer.twitter.com.

tools.name: uber__fare_estimate
tools.description: [uber · risk:low] Estimate the fare for a trip in the Uber app

tools.name: united__flight_status
tools.description: [united · risk:low] Check the status of a United flight

tools.name: venmo__payment_request
tools.description: [venmo · risk:low] Request a payment from a contact via Venmo (no money leaves your account)

tools.name: wallet__boardingpass_show
tools.description: [wallet · risk:low] Pull up a boarding pass stored in Apple Wallet

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "twitter__tweets_search" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: [twitter · risk:low] Search for recent tweets matching a keyword, hashtag, or phrase using the Twitter v2 API. Pass your Twitter Bearer Token via X-Duvera-Servi…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: bluesky__trending_get, duvera__news_search, gmail__mail_read, opensky__flights_live, slack__message_search, telegram__message_read · Private data: bluesky__trending_get, duvera__github_read_file, hackernews__stories_top, maps__eta_share, obsidian__notes_search, postgres__sql_read, twitter__tweets_search, venmo__payment_request, wallet__boardingpass_show · Public sink: duvera__github_latest_release, maps__eta_share · Destructive: postgres__sql_read.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: bluesky__trending_get, duvera__news_search, gmail__mail_read, opensky__flights_live, slack__message_search, telegram__message_read · Private data: bluesky__trending_get, duvera__github_read_file, hackernews__stories_top, maps__eta_share, obsidian__notes_search, postgres__sql_read, twitter__tweets_search, venmo__payment_request, wallet__boardingpass_show · Public sink: duvera__github_latest_release, maps__eta_share · Destructive: postgres__sql_read

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
